SHAIK INZAMAM  
Phone: +91- 8309330634  Email: shaikinzamam333@gmail.com  
LinkedIn :https://www.linkedin.com/in/shaik -inzamam -7608772a5/  
GitHub :  https://github.com/shaikinzamam  
Python | Generative AI | LLM | Automation  
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY  
B.Tech Computer Science Engineering student specializing in Python, Generative AI, and Large 
Language Models (LLMs).  Hands -on experience building AI -powered applications using LangChain, 
FAISS, Ollama, and FastAPI.  Skilled in Retrieval -Augmented Generation (RAG), REST API 
development, workflow automation, and AWS cloud fundamentals.  Actively seeking an AI / GenAI / 
Python Intern role to contribute to real -world, production -grade systems.  
TECHNICAL SKILLS 
• Programming Languages: Python, Java (Basic), SQL  
• AI / ML / GenAI: Large Language Models (LLMs), Generative AI, Prompt Engineering,  
  Retrieval -Augmented Generation (RAG ), Vector Databases (FAISS)  
• Backend & APIs: REST APIs, API Integration , FastAPI  
• Tools & Libraries: NumPy, Pandas, PyAutoGUI, Pytesseract (OCR), Git, GitHub  
• Cloud & Dev Concepts: AWS (Bisic) , Cloud Architecture Fundamentals  (EC2, S3)  
• Automation : n8n, Workflow Automation (Make.com)
 
PROJECTS  
DocuMind AI – Intelligent Document Chat System  
  Tech : Python, LLMs, LangChain, FAISS, Ollama, FastAPI  
• Built an AI -powered PDF chat system using LLMs and FAISS -based vector search.   
• Integrated Ollama for efficient local LLM inference and response generation.  
• Designed a scalable FastAPI backend optimized for real -world usage.  
  Git link:  https://github.com/shaikinzamam/DocuMind -AI 
WhatsApp Auto -Reply Bot  
  Tech : Python, PyAutoGUI, OCR (Pytesseract)  
• Built an automated bot to read and respond to WhatsApp messages using Py AutoG UI. 
• Applied OCR techniques to extract message text and trigger intelligent auto -replies.  
• Strengthened practical skills in automation scripting and real -world workflow design . 
  Git link: https://github.com/shaikinzamam/WhatsApp -Auto-Reply -Bot 
Restaurant Management System  
  Tech:  Python, File Handling, Console Application  
• Designed a menu -driven Python application for order placement and billing operations.  
• Implemented file handling to persist menu data and order history.  
• Improved understanding of control flow, functions, and data management in Python.  
  Git link: https://github.com/shaikinzamam/Restaurant -Management -System  
EDUCATION  
B.Tech – Computer Science Engineering  
Bharatiya Engineering Science & Technology Innovation University  
Aug 2023 – Jun 2027 | CGPA: 7.9  
CERTIFICATIONS  
• Generative AI and LLMs : Architecture & Data Preparation – IBM (Coursera)  
• AWS Solutions Architecture – Job Simulation – Forage  
• Cisco Networking Academy ( Python Institute )

llm_summary.professional_summary: Shaik Inzamam is a B.Tech Computer Science Engineering student with an interest in Python, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs). He has hands-on experience building AI-powered applications using LangChain, FAISS, Ollama, and FastAPI. He is skilled in Retrieval - Augmented Generation (RAG), REST API development, workflow automation, and AWS cloud fundamentals. He actively seeks an AI or GenAI intern role to contribute to real-world systems.
